overview: Smart Vehicle Finder is a 3-page interactive vehicle recommendation app for the Indian market. Users can find the perfect car, bike, or truck using smart filters, browse a full catalog of 400+ vehicles, and locate authorized dealers across India.
features: Smart finder with budget, fuel, transmission, usage, and mileage filters
Buy from Dealer button on every vehicle card
23 authorized dealers across India with search and filters
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
